name: Coupang, Inc.
summary: Coupang, Inc. is a technology and Fortune 150 company listed on the NYSE that provides retail, restaurant delivery, video streaming, and fintech services under brands including Coupang, Eats, Play, Rocket Now, and Farfetch. Operating in over 190 countries and territories, Coupang offers fast delivery, broad product selection, fresh groceries, luxury goods, digital entertainment, and payments, serving millions of customers primarily in Korea and internationally.

products.name: Coupang
products.description: Online retail marketplace offering fast delivery, broad selection, and frictionless returns to consumers.

products.name: Rocket Now
products.description: Same-day or rapid delivery service with order cutoffs as late as midnight.

products.name: Farfetch
products.description: Global luxury goods marketplace connecting customers with leading luxury brands direct-to-consumer.

products.name: WOW Membership
products.description: Subscription membership offering delivery benefits and service perks to customers.

products.name: Fulfillment and Logistics by Coupang (FLC)
products.description: Third-party fulfillment and logistics services offered to merchants in Korea.

products.name: Rocket Overseas
products.description: Cross-border commerce offering enabling SME partners to reach international customers, including in Taiwan.

products.name: Coupang Private Label Brand
products.description: Development and marketing of high-quality products under Coupang's own private label at affordable prices.

products.name: Coupang Advertising
products.description: Advertising solutions for suppliers and merchants on Coupang websites and mobile applications.
